blocks.code:
Item: padding 8 12 cursor pointer
  state default
    background transparent
  state highlighted
    background #333
  state selected
    background #3B82F6

Trigger: padding 8 12 background #1E1E2E radius 8 border 1 #333 cursor pointer
  onclick toggle Dropdown
  "Select an option..."

Dropdown: vertical background #1E1E2E radius 8 shadow lg hidden width 200
  onclick-outside close self
  onkeydown escape close self
  onkeydown arrow-down highlight next
  onkeydown arrow-up highlight prev
  onkeydown enter select highlighted, close self

  - Item onhover highlight self, onclick select self, close Dropdown "Dashboard"
  - Item onhover highlight self, onclick select self, close Dropdown "Settings"
  - Item onhover highlight self, onclick select self, close Dropdown "Profile"

blocks.code:
$isOnline: true

Status hor, gap 8, vertical-center, background #1A1A23, padding 12, radius 8
  Dot width 8, height 8, radius 4
    if $isOnline then background #10B981 else background #666
  Text if $isOnline then "Online" else "Offline"
  Button background #333, padding 6 12, radius 4, size 12
    onclick assign $isOnline to not $isOnline
    "Toggle"

blocks.code:
$loggedIn: false

Header hor, between, vertical-center, background #1A1A23, padding 16, radius 8
  Logo weight 600, "MyApp"
  if $loggedIn
    Row horizontal, gap 12, vertical-center
      Avatar width 32, height 32, radius 16, background #2271c1
      Button background #333, padding 8 16, radius 6
        onclick assign $loggedIn to false
        "Logout"
  else
    Button background #2271c1, padding 8 16, radius 6
      onclick assign $loggedIn to true
      "Login"

blocks.code:
$darkMode: true

Card padding 24, radius 12, ver, gap 16
  if $darkMode then background #1A1A23 else background #F5F5F5
  Title size 20, weight 600
    if $darkMode then color white else color #1A1A23
    "Theme Demo"
  Text if $darkMode then color #9CA3AF else color #666
    "Click to switch themes"
  Button padding 12, radius 6
    if $darkMode then background #2271c1 else background #1A1A23
    onclick assign $darkMode to not $darkMode
    if $darkMode then "Switch to Light" else "Switch to Dark"
